checkin.journal:
Grateful for: My team, the love I'm getting back from them, it's so humble, Fuck, maybe that's it, maybe I just need fucking drink every now, then to take the edge off, Grateful for Cosita, for family, for friends ❤️❤️❤️, New ideas being calm, in general, for being able to be me myself New ideas being calm, in general, for being able to be me myself
Today great: Today would be great to have some nice meetings and to get some rest, massage, nice dinner 
Affirmation: I'm calm but tipsy still, but

supplements_list.name: mg glycinate 1 capsule (probably wont take it more)
